name: live-in-grace-walk-in-love
description: Bob Goff's 'Live in Grace, Walk in Love: A 365-Day Journey' — a daily devotional that invites you to spend a year learning to live in God's grace and walk in His love, one story at a time.
useCase: Grow spiritually through daily devotional readings, understand God's grace, learn to love others practically, and build consistent spiritual habits.
knownRisks: Explicitly Christian — best suited for Christian readers
365 daily readings — not a narrative book, more like a daily guide
Same author as 'Everybody, Always' — similar voice and themes
